rows.label: tev073001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Sun'barac about
Director General Chausson.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0001
rows.name:
In terms of his aptitude for logical
thought and rational judgment, he's
like an Orphean in a human body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Humans often display a tendency to let their emotions
complicate attempts at mutual understanding, but we
have no issues communicating with Chausson.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0003
rows.name:
He seems to be the one spearheading
humanity's proactive embrace of
other xenoform races.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0004
rows.name:
One day I would like to hear
him speak in more detail about
his vision for this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_SEL1021
rows.name:
Ask Sun'barac if anything
is troubling him.

rows.label: tev073001_SEL1031
rows.name:
Ask Sun'barac about Riiz
and her attack on NLA.

rows.label: tev073001_SEL1051
rows.name: Ask Sun'barac about Riiz and Dagahn.

rows.label: tev073001_SEL1071
rows.name:
Ask Sun'barac about the
battle for the Central Life.

rows.label: tev073001_SEL1091
rows.name: Ask Sun'barac about Commander Vandham.

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0005
rows.name:
The senirapa water we used on
Sun'celeg was the last of our supply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0006
rows.name:
We currently have Kon'luarb
researching ways to cultivate more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0007
rows.name:
But if we can't find a pure sample
for him to replicate, his efforts
will have been for naught.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG0008
rows.name:
We must find some new senirapa water
soon, so that we can share the radiance
of our Ovah with future generations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1001
rows.name:
All those who have drawn her
ire—even fellow Growth
members—have met brutal deaths.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1002
rows.name:
The Bias often advised each
other to stay on her good
side if they wanted to live.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1003
rows.name:
You may have successfully repelled her attack
this time, but by my estimation, there's a 96.7
percent chance that she will return to kill you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1004
rows.name:
Please be on guard. I imagine that she will
attempt to hit you with everything she can
merely to sate her own rage and bloodlust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1009
rows.name:
I've heard that Riiz makes anyone who
disrespects Dagahn pay for it in
blood—even high-ranking Growth officers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1010
rows.name:
I could not even begin to understand why a woman as
heartless, cruel, and self-centered as her would
care so much about defending the honor of another.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1011
rows.name:
Perhaps you humans would have a
better perspective on the matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1012
rows.name:
Might it be related to the deep bonds of
"family" that humans often speak of?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1017
rows.name:
If you humans were to perish, we
defenseless Orphe would be slaughtered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1018
rows.name: So this battle is not yours alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1019
rows.name:
I wish to see our Ovah passed
down to another generation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1020
rows.name:
So for my own interests as well as yours,
I would like nothing more than to see you
successfully secure your Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1025
rows.name:
With the destruction of the
Growth, our odds of survival
have increased dramatically.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1026
rows.name:
Having inherited the leadership of the
Orphe over Kun'luarb, I went to BLADE HQ
to pay the debt my people owe to yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1027
rows.name:
But a man named Vandham said that wouldn't be
necessary, as it had been a "two-way street."
Though I pressed, he would speak no more of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1028
rows.name:
Do all humans really settle such debts
simply by uttering words of gratitude?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG1029
rows.name:
If that's the case, you are allowing
yourselves to be cheated. You have
a right to greater profits.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Sun'barac about recent developments.

rows.label: tev073001_MSG2001
rows.name:
Thanks to the efforts of Kon'luarb
and yourself, the senirapa-water
cultivation project is a success.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG2002
rows.name:
However, increasing our population has also left
us facing increased conflict with both humans
and the other beings who live on this ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG2003
rows.name:
As the leader of the Orphe, I would like
to speak to your representatives immediately
and head off even greater problems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG2004
rows.name:
Once an accord is reached, I hope we
can count on you to help any Orphe who
ends up embroiled in such a conflict.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG2005
rows.name:
Since you know us so well, you would
be a big help in resolving these
situations. Please consider it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Sun'barac about recent developments.

rows.label: tev073001_MSG3001
rows.name:
A provisional 20 percent Nopon tax has been
implemented, and everyone on the Ma-non ship
is sharing the cost of providing the discount.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG3002
rows.name:
This has caused the Nopon to begin
spending their accumulated savings,
which is an unexpected bonus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG3003
rows.name:
A lot of the companies are raking
in so much profit that they don't
even seem to care about the tax.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG3004
rows.name:
...Hmm. This Kopopo may turn out to be
a competent representative after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG3005
rows.name:
I shall continue to support his
future policy proposals with all
the fervor I can muster. ...Huzzah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG4001
rows.name:
The survey you conducted gave me the
confidence to enter the election.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG4002
rows.name:
With support from a wide variety of city
residents, I was ultimately chosen to
serve as the xenoform representative.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG4003
rows.name:
I hope to secure the help of my
formal rivals, Kopopo and Adappin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG4004
rows.name:
Together, we can transform NLA into a
utopia where peoples of different
planets can live together as equals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073001_MSG4005
rows.name:
What humans achieved on Mira was nothing
short of a miracle, and I assure you that
I intend to accomplish no less myself.[ST:wait ]
